creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #67)
Changelog for 396.024 [1] says

> libnvidia-glvkspirv.so, the new Vulkan SPIR-V compiler added in 396.24, cannot be found at run time.

I can't find the same page for 018, though.

[1]: https://www.nvidia.ru/Download/driverResults.aspx/133876
